name: Stats Row — COVID-19 Vaccine Efficacy Dashboard
input: Create a stats dashboard showing COVID-19 vaccine efficacy: Overall Efficacy 95%, Severe Disease Prevention 100%, Infection After Dose 1 52%, Hospitalization Reduction 89%, Duration of Protection 6+ months, Booster Efficacy 94%.

napkinBenchmark: Stats cards with percentage values and clear metric labeling.

data.title: COVID-19 Vaccine Efficacy Metrics
data.caption: Key efficacy metrics from COVID-19 mRNA vaccine Phase III trials
